    • NativeClientKubernetesFixture

  • Method Details

    • createAndWait

      public void createAndWait(String namespace, io.kubernetes.client.openapi.models.V1Deployment deployment, io.kubernetes.client.openapi.models.V1Service service, boolean appendTag)
      This is the preferred method to use when creating a deployment alongside with a service. It creates the given resources as-well as waits for them to be created. The delay check is intentionally not taken as an argument, so that it stays as tight as possible, providing reasonable defaults.

    • createAndWait

      public void createAndWait(String namespace, @Nullable io.kubernetes.client.openapi.models.V1ConfigMap configMap, @Nullable io.kubernetes.client.openapi.models.V1Secret secret)
